cluster_label: Pedalling, jumping, balancing and ball play
age_mark_on_listing: Ages 2-99 years (Liberty House Toys product page)
key_specs: {"piece_count":"6 (3 large, 3 small)","dimensions":"Large H85×W370mm; small H45×W260mm","materials":"PP plastic with TPE rubber rim","included_items":"6 stones, game suggestions","other":"Three steepness sides per triangle; stacks; 100 kg load"}
product_description_under_30_words: Six stackable triangular stepping stones in two sizes. Each stone has three slope sides so you can dial difficulty when laying a path.
ember_verdict: When cushions-and-tape has run its course, this is the proper path kit. Lay step–pause–turn rules on laminate without daredevil height. Each stone’s three sides progress difficulty without buying more. Pricey — borrow from nursery or try pre-loved before committing.
rank_rationale: #1 over #2: three steepness settings and two stone sizes create richer rule-based paths than flat budget stones, which fits the nearly-three sequenced-movement brief better.
why_it_fits: Variable steepness and two sizes create sequenced, rule-based paths — the core 34–36m shift versus earlier throw-and-aim games.
caveats: Premium price; one set may feel short for long corridors — extend with tape markers rather than duplicating the same set.
gift_note: Strong gift if the family has floor space and already plays active indoor games. Pair with a simple rule card.
ownership_note: Many nurseries own these — ask before duplicating. Common on pre-loved sites.
safety_notes: Non-slip rubber base. Supervise on hard floors until your child knows their limits — planned movement, not height daredevil play.
rating_source: Amazon UK aggregated listing for Gonge 1137385 (same SKU)
review_quality_note: Sustained praise for reconfigurability and floor grip; Liberty House shows verified UK owner reviews on check date.
preloved_signal_note: Gonge River Stones regularly appear on Vinted and eBay UK; check rubber rim wear.
substitute_if_unavailable: Tippi Sensory Stepping Stones 5-pack (budget path starter)
evidence_notes: Primary Liberty House URL smoke-checked HTTP 200 on 2026-07-22. Age from live listing Ages 2–99. Ratings from Amazon UK same-SKU aggregate because Liberty House public count is thin (3 verified reviews).
buying_factor_memo: Five factors set order for nearly-three path play. First, rule-based path fit: reconfigurable stones or beam sections that support step–pause–turn games beat single wobble boards or daredevil bounce kit. Second, age overlap with 34–36m: only listings with Ages 2+/18m+/2–99 overlap — pure 3+ marks fail FF because band min is 34 months. Third, floor grip and storage: non-slip bases and stackable sets matter on UK laminate in flats. Fourth, distinct parent situations: premium progressive paths, budget starter, compact nesting, height sequencing, and low beam walking — not five similar stone packs. Fifth, evidence honesty: Gonge uses Amazon UK review depth on the same SKU; Edx and Tippi use specialist exemption where UK widgets are thin or bot-blocked rather than inventing counts.

caveats: Only three pieces — short path unless combined with cushions or River Stones. Liberty House public review count is thin.

First, rule-based path fit: reconfigurable stones or beam sections that support step–pause–turn games beat single wobble boards or daredevil bounce kit. Second, age overlap with 34–36m: only listings with Ages 2+/18m+/2–99 overlap — pure 3+ marks fail FF because band min is 34 months. Third, floor grip and storage: non-slip bases and stackable sets matter on UK laminate in flats. Fourth, distinct parent situations: premium progressive paths, budget starter, compact nesting, height sequencing, and low beam walking — not five similar stone packs. Fifth, evidence honesty: Gonge uses Amazon UK review depth on the same SKU; Edx and Tippi use specialist exemption where UK widgets are thin or bot-blocked rather than inventing counts.
